title: teucrium siculum subsp. euganeum
intro: Teucrium siculum subsp. euganeum, also known as Italian germander or Euganeo germander, is a subspecies of the Teucrium siculum plant, a member of the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Teucrium siculum subsp. euganeum include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health, as well as its potential to protect against certain diseases. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
